title: Corals TFC // 1.18.2 // 1.20.1 // 1.21.1 //
description: better use of corals in the TFC world
body:
===================================================
> - **the mod requires Terrafirmacraft**

===================================================


- This small Mod is intended to introduce the effective use of corals in gameplay in the TFC world.
- Dead corals, when ground, produce coral powder, which is a very good fertilizer or a semi-product for mortar.
- This gives completely new and useful values for all corals, they will no longer have only decorative value.


**Corals in the TFC world only occur in warm climates and high temperatures in the ocean biome.**
![multi1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RzMcpTLU/images/af7120b58067b0d1d3b851a28d5e71994f19e76a.png)
